identity.problem: Local feature notes need one bounded implementation packet before any downstream handoff.
identity.outcome: The maintainer can validate one explicit feature packet without governance or topology side effects.

included: Create one packet from explicit local context.
Validate packet validity and BMAD readiness as separate results.

acceptanceCriteria: Given explicit local context, when validation runs, then packet validity and BMAD readiness are reported separately.
constraints: Do not infer identity, phase, topology, or scope from branch name, open editor, or cwd/current working directory.
Do not write Lens governance, release clone, top-down runtime, Landscape, Derived Graph, Salmon, promotion, adjacency, pressure, roadmap, service, domain, or program truth paths.

assumptions.text: The operator supplied the source notes explicitly.

provenance.rawUserWording: Start from one feature: safe local export.

handoff.implementationContext: Implement only the safe local export packet behavior and validators described here.
handoff.antiInferenceInstructions: Use only packet fields and explicit inputRefs; do not infer from branch, open editor, or cwd/current working directory.
